title: TrustForge Packet Fragment
description: Fragmentation header attached to a Packet when its payload is too large for the underlying transport (LoRa MTU, BLE characteristic size, etc.). Fragments are reassembled by their destination using `fragment_id` + `index` + `count`.

fragment_id.description: Stable identifier shared by every fragment that belongs to the same logical packet.

index.description: Zero-based index of this fragment within the sequence.

count.description: Total number of fragments in the sequence.

total_payload_bytes.description: Size of the reassembled payload in bytes; reassembly fails if the assembled output differs.

payload_digest.description: Hash of the reassembled canonical payload; consumers MUST verify this after reassembly.
